data.body: PRE-FLIP validation running (baseline C0=7141adf3c5456bd4374ff43efacc27e0b5056be5). Deployment confirmed: local global build kickstarted -> has finalize_event + global-build transition signs; venv build fixed. KEY: the 0ba4 txn bug only affected the LOCAL/agent txn path (transition/claim/close) — CI's reconciler signs via its own inline seam (inbound_translate site 2) and the Gerrit review-bot LINK signs via append_event, so CI+Gerrit were already signing in-scope events. So only local/agent builds needed the fix (done on this machine). Validation window checks [C0..HEAD] for any unsigned non-SNAPSHOT in-scope event across all active writers; if clean -> anchor after the window, flip. 4/6 tickets closed (79da,4dc0,1a51,0ba4); 8d91 test landed; 8d91 anchor + 8d39 flip remain.
